summary: Tested Learn page topic hub modal popup feature. All 11 tests PASSED - modal opens on topic box click (stays on same URL), all 4 tabs (Overview, Videos, Products, Services) present and functional, content changes per topic, 'Send to Concierge' button visible at bottom, modal closes properly.
seed_data_creation: N/A - content is hardcoded in TOPIC_CONFIG
context_for_next_testing_agent: LearnTopicModal.jsx contains hardcoded TOPIC_CONFIG for all 12 topics with static content (not from backend API). Modal opens via selectedTopic state in LearnPage.jsx. Each topic has Overview (What You'll Learn), Videos, Products, Services tabs.
mocked_api_info: Topic content is hardcoded in TOPIC_CONFIG object in LearnTopicModal.jsx - NOT fetched from backend database

features_tested: Topic box click opens modal (not navigation)
Modal has 4 tabs: Overview, Videos, Products, Services
Overview tab shows 'What You'll Learn' topics
Videos tab shows video cards with thumbnails
Products tab shows product cards with 'View options' links
'Send to Concierge for More Details' button visible at bottom
Different topics show different content (Puppy Basics, Grooming, Training Basics)
